summary: Comprehensive testing of Supreme Pet Clinic website completed. All core functionality working with Bengali text properly displayed. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend navigation and forms operational, admin authentication working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Error message for wrong password not clearly visible in UI
Dropdown selections in appointment form have interaction issues

integration_issues.issue: Blog page shows loading spinner but content loads correctly

passed_tests: Homepage loads with Bengali text and hero section
Navigation between all pages (হোম, সেবাসমূহ, ব্লগ, যোগাযোগ)
Services page displays all services with Bengali descriptions
Blog page shows blog posts from API
Contact page appointment and message forms present
Admin dashboard shows all tabs (appointments, blogs, messages)
All 14 backend API endpoints working (100% success)
